risk_register.mitigation: Gate on GL-087. Characterization tests must cover every auth failure path.
Gate on GL-090 and GL-124. Preserve exact error codes and status codes.
Gate on GL-113 / GL-117 integration. Correlation ID must still propagate to response headers.
Gate on GL-139. No extraction must remove or weaken the write lock.
Gate on GL-140. run() must continue to instantiate ThreadingHTTPServer.
Preserve per-IP limits, 429 responses, and Retry-After headers.
Gate on GL-045A. Validate against OpenAPI spec after every extraction step.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Route characterization tests
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Add exhaustive HTTP-level characterization tests for every route before any extraction.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Response/error helper extraction
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Extract _send_json, _send_html, _gl030_error, _handle_json_error to a dedicated module or mixin.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Request parsing helper extraction
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Extract _read_json, _missing, _parse_int_query_param, and validation helpers to a dedicated module.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Route dispatch registry plan/extraction
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Replace do_GET/do_POST if/elif chains with a registry-based dispatch table.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Public route group extraction
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Extract /health, /readiness, /dashboard to a public routes module.

proposed_follow_up_issues.title: Protected route group extraction
proposed_follow_up_issues.description: Extract read-only and mutation protected routes to domain route modules.

non_goals: No production code change in GL-143
No production SaaS claim in GL-143
next_issue: GL-144 Tenant / Workspace Data Model Design
